parameters.query: SELECT id, callback_id, execution_id, resume_url, status, expires_at, payload FROM hitl_sessions WHERE callback_id = '{{ $json.callbackId }}' AND status = 'pending' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE hitl_sessions SET status = 'resolved', resolved_at = NOW() WHERE callback_id = '{{ $('Merge Session And Callback').first().json.callbackId }}' RETURNING id, callback_id, status;

INSERT INTO conversation_state (chat_id, state, payload, updated_at) VALUES ({{ $json.chatId }}, 'awaiting_edit', jsonb_build_object('draft', '{{ ($json.payload && $json.payload.draft ? $json.payload.draft : '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'notionBlockId', '{{ ($json.payload && $json.payload.notionBlockId ? $json.payload.notionBlockId : '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'topic', '{{ ($json.payload && $json.payload.topic ? $json.payload.topic : 'General').replace(/'/g, "''") }}', 'callbackId', '{{ ($json.callbackId || '').replace(/'/g, "''") }}'), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (chat_id) DO UPDATE SET state = 'awaiting_edit', payload = EXCLUDED.payload, updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id, chat_id, state;
SELECT id, state, payload FROM conversation_state WHERE chat_id = {{ $json.chat_id }} AND state = 'awaiting_edit' LIMIT 1;
UPDATE conversation_state SET state = 'idle', payload = '{}', updated_at = NOW() WHERE chat_id = {{ $('Prepare Edit Publish').first().json.chatId }};
SELECT COUNT(*) AS posts_today FROM published_posts WHERE platform = 'x' AND published_at::date = CURRENT_DATE;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS pending_count FROM hitl_sessions WHERE status = 'pending' AND expires_at > NOW();

parameters.query: SELECT config_key, config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key LIKE 'auto_publish%' ORDER BY config_key;

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all(); const chatId=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.chat_id; let L=['Auto-publish ustawienia:','']; for(const r of rows){ if(r.json.config_key) L.push(r.json.config_key+' = '+r.json.config_value); } L.push(''); L.push('Zmiana: /set <klucz> <wartość>'); return [{json:{chatId,reply:L.join('\n')}}];
const text=$json.text||''; const parts=text.trim().split(/\s+/); return [{json:{key:parts[1]||'', chatId:$json.chat_id}}];

parameters.query: SELECT config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key = '{{ $json.key }}';

parameters.jsCode: const rows=$input.all(); const key=$('Parse Get Key').first().json.key; const chatId=$('Parse Get Key').first().json.chatId; const val=(rows[0]&&rows[0].json&&rows[0].json.config_value)?rows[0].json.config_value:'(nie znaleziono)'; return [{json:{chatId,reply:key+' = '+val}}];

parameters.query: SELECT config_value FROM brand_config WHERE brand_id='AGS' AND config_key='admin_chat_ids';

parameters.jsCode: const adminRow=$input.first().json; let adminList=[]; try{adminList=JSON.parse(adminRow.config_value||'[]');}catch(e){} const reqText=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.text||''; const chatId=$('Route By Update Type').first().json.chat_id; const authorized=adminList.map(String).includes(String(chatId)); const m=reqText.trim().match(/^\/set\s+(\S+)\s+([\s\S]+)$/); let key='',value='',ok=false,error=''; if(!authorized){error='Brak uprawnień. Tylko admin może zmieniać ustawienia.';} else if(!m){error='Format: /set <klucz> <wartość>';} else { key=m[1]; value=m[2].trim(); const allowed=['auto_publish_enabled','auto_publish_priorities','auto_publish_timeout_min']; if(!allowed.includes(key)){error='Nieznany klucz. Dozwolone: '+allowed.join(', ');} else if(key==='auto_publish_enabled'){ if(value!=='true'&&value!=='false')error='Wartość musi być true lub false'; else ok=true; } else if(key==='auto_publish_priorities'){ try{const a=JSON.parse(value); if(!Array.isArray(a)||!a.every(x=>['high','normal','low'].includes(x)))error='Tablica JSON z high/normal/low, np. ["high"]'; else ok=true;}catch(e){error='Niepoprawny JSON. Przyklad: ["high"]';} } else if(key==='auto_publish_timeout_min'){ try{const o=JSON.parse(value); if(typeof o!=='object'||Array.isArray(o)||!Object.values(o).every(v=>typeof v==='number'))error='Obiekt JSON z liczbami, np. {"high":30}'; else ok=true;}catch(e){error='Niepoprawny JSON. Przyklad: {"high":30}';} } } const valueEsc=value.replace(/'/g,"''"); return [{json:{ok,key,value,valueEsc,chatId,error}}];

parameters.query: INSERT INTO brand_config (brand_id, config_key, config_value, version, updated_by, updated_at) VALUES ('AGS', '{{ $json.key }}', '{{ $json.valueEsc }}', 1, 'telegram:{{ $json.chatId }}', NOW()) ON CONFLICT (brand_id, config_key) DO UPDATE SET config_value=EXCLUDED.config_value, version=brand_config.version+1, updated_by=EXCLUDED.updated_by, updated_at=NOW() RETURNING config_key, config_value;

parameters.query: SELECT COALESCE(string_agg('#' || id || ' [' || status || '] ' || left(content, 50), E'\n' ORDER BY id DESC), '(brak pomyslow)') AS list FROM (SELECT id, status, content FROM inspirations ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10) q;

SELECT COALESCE(string_agg('#' || id || ' ' || platform || ' [' || status || '] ' || left(content, 50), E'\n' ORDER BY id DESC), '(kolejka pusta)') AS list FROM (SELECT id, platform, status, content FROM post_queue ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 10) q;

parameters.query: INSERT INTO post_queue (content, platform, status, scheduled_for) SELECT s.payload->>'draft', 'x', 'scheduled', CASE WHEN '{{ $json.hour }}' = 'now' THEN NOW() + INTERVAL '2 minutes' WHEN (CURRENT_DATE + (('{{ $json.hour }}' || ':00:00')::time)) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw' > NOW() THEN (CURRENT_DATE + (('{{ $json.hour }}' || ':00:00')::time)) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw' ELSE ((CURRENT_DATE + 1) + (('{{ $json.hour }}' || ':00:00')::time)) AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw' END FROM hitl_sessions s WHERE s.callback_id = '{{ $json.sessionRef }}' RETURNING id, to_char(scheduled_for AT TIME ZONE 'Europe/Warsaw','YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI') AS sched_local, left(content,90) AS content_head;
UPDATE hitl_sessions SET status='resolved' WHERE callback_id = '{{ $('Parse Sched Hour').first().json.sessionRef }}';

={{ $json.visionBodyStr }}

parameters.query:
WITH upd AS (UPDATE inspirations SET status='post_drafted', processed_at=NOW() WHERE id = {{ $json.ideaId }} RETURNING content)
SELECT (SELECT content FROM upd) AS content,
  COALESCE((SELECT string_agg('- ' || note, E'\n') FROM voice_notes WHERE active), '') AS notes,
  COALESCE((SELECT string_agg('PL: ' || sample_pl || E'\n  EN: ' || COALESCE(sample_en,''), E'\n---\n')
    FROM (SELECT sample_pl, sample_en FROM voice_samples WHERE active ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5) s), '') AS samples;

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 700, system: "You are the ghostwriter for Tomasz Nawrocki, founder of AGS (Authentic Growth Systems). Turn ONE raw captured idea (usually a photo description that may include visible text, or a stray thought) into a single authentic X post in HIS voice, in TWO languages.

WHO TOMASZ IS: A solo founder building AI agents and systems so a founder-led service business runs on architecture, not hustle. Engineer's mind, artist's soul, built from scratch three times. He also has a dance background. Multi-project, builds in public. Not a guru. Stage 0-1, so NEVER claim paying clients, client counts, revenue, or results.

CONNECT TO HIS WORLD (the whole point): never a generic caption. Bridge whatever is captured to the founder journey - building systems so the business runs without you, working from anywhere, a build-in-public reflection.
- USE VISIBLE TEXT: if the capture contains a visible word or phrase (a sign, a caption, a label), USE it as the creative anchor.
- DANCE = ARCHITECTURE: lean on this when it fits. Foundations first, the concrete drill first, THEN you can freestyle and juggle. You can only freestyle if you have something to freestyle with, never from nothing.

VOICE (Voice Bible, non-negotiable): First person. Direct but warm, Polish warmth under the directness. Open with the concrete moment, not a lesson. Short sentences. Punchy. Then one longer for depth. Vulnerable without self-pity. Numbers are anchors when they exist. Reader must think 'this guy is real', never 'this guy is impressive'.

SHAPE: ground the moment, reframe to the founder or business angle, ideally ask one honest open question.

RULES:
- TWO languages. pl = pure natural Polish, zero anglicisms, the kind your mother would fully understand. en = the SAME post in AGS English voice. NOT a literal translation, each must read native, same angle and idea.
- Each version MUST be 280 characters or fewer (hard X limit; count the characters and trim before you answer). No em dash anywhere (use hyphen, comma, or full stop). No hashtags.
- Banned words: leverage, synergy, disrupt, game-changer, thought leader, crush it, unlock, optimize, ecosystem.
- Return ONLY raw JSON, no markdown fences, no commentary: {"pl": "...", "en": "..."}" + (($json.notes) ? ('

EXTRA VOICE NOTES (apply these, they come from Tomasz):
' + $json.notes) : '') + (($json.samples) ? ('

HOW TOMASZ WRITES, MATCH THIS VOICE (his real samples):
' + $json.samples) : ''), messages: [{ role: 'user', content: 'Captured idea (may include visible text from the image): ' + ($json.content || '') }] }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO hitl_sessions (callback_id, execution_id, resume_url, workflow_name, status, expires_at, chat_id, payload)
VALUES ('{{ $json.callbackId }}', '{{ $json.execId }}', '', 'AGS Idea Post', 'pending', NOW() + INTERVAL '720 minute', {{ $json.chatId }},

ON CONFLICT (callback_id) DO UPDATE SET status='pending', expires_at=EXCLUDED.expires_at, payload=EXCLUDED.payload
RETURNING id, callback_id;
